intro: This skill bundles open dependency-update PRs/MRs into a single verified change. Setup will configure how your project lists PRs/MRs, retrieves changelogs, runs its build and test suite, and creates the final bundled PR.

extensionPoints.description: How to list and filter open dependency-update PRs/MRs.
extensionPoints.default: List all open PRs/MRs and filter by common dependency-bot author names and title patterns (bump, update, upgrade, chore(deps)).
extensionPoints.prompt: How should dependency-update PRs/MRs be listed? (e.g., 'gh pr list --label dependencies', 'glab mr list --author renovate[bot]', filter by author like 'dependabot[bot]')

detect.description: Look for dependency bot configuration files to understand which bot and labels are in use.

extensionPoints.description: How to find changelogs for dependencies in this project's ecosystem.
extensionPoints.default: Attempt to locate CHANGELOG.md, release notes, or registry pages for each dependency based on its package ecosystem.
extensionPoints.prompt: How should changelogs be retrieved for your dependencies? (e.g., 'Check npm registry for release notes', 'Read CHANGELOG.md from the dependency GitHub repo', 'Use gem info for Ruby gems')

detect.description: Look for package manifests to identify the dependency ecosystem.

extensionPoints.description: The command to build the project.
extensionPoints.prompt: What command builds your project? (e.g., 'npm run build', 'make build', 'cargo build', 'mvn compile', 'mix compile')

detect.description: Look for build configuration files to suggest the appropriate build command.

extensionPoints.description: The command to run the full test suite.
extensionPoints.prompt: What command runs your test suite? (e.g., 'npm test', 'bundle exec rspec', 'pytest', 'cargo test', 'make test', 'mix test')

detect.description: Look for test configuration files to suggest the appropriate test command.

extensionPoints.description: The command to run linting or static analysis.
extensionPoints.prompt: What command runs your linter or static analysis? (e.g., 'npm run lint', 'rubocop', 'flake8', 'cargo clippy', 'mix credo'). Leave blank to skip.

detect.description: Look for linter configuration files to suggest the appropriate lint command.

extensionPoints.description: How to identify warnings in build and test output.
extensionPoints.default: Scan for lines containing 'warning', 'WARN', 'deprecated', or 'deprecation notice'.
extensionPoints.prompt: How should warnings be identified in build output? (e.g., specific patterns, compiler-specific formats, a warnings baseline file). Leave blank to use common patterns.

extensionPoints.description: How to create the final bundled PR/MR after verification passes.
extensionPoints.prompt: How should the final bundled change be submitted? (e.g., 'gh pr create --title "chore: bundle dependency updates" --label dependencies', 'glab mr create'). Leave blank to output a report and leave the branch ready for manual PR creation.

detect.description: Look for forge configuration to suggest the appropriate PR/MR creation command.
